observations.text: Test testUserAuth fails because validateToken(null) throws NullPointerException in src/auth/token.ts:42.
Calling validateToken with null argument crashes the auth middleware; same root cause as the production outage last week in middleware/auth.ts:87.
The rate limiter at src/api/rate-limiter.ts:120 uses sliding window but the docs say fixed window, causing confusion about burst limits.
